query:
SELECT 
  leadId, 
  dataAgendamento, 
  horaAgendamento, 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY createdAt) as ids
FROM agendamentos
GROUP BY leadId, DATE(dataAgendamento), horaAgendamento
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 10;
